goal: Add sum.js exporting sum(a,b)=a+b with a passing node:test

sprints.title: Implement sum module
sprints.description: Create sum.js in the project root that defines a function sum(a, b) returning a + b, and export it using CommonJS (module.exports) or ES modules consistent with the project's existing conventions. Keep the implementation minimal and pure.

sprints.title: Add passing test using node:test
sprints.description: Create a test file (e.g., sum.test.js) that imports sum from sum.js and uses the built-in node:test framework with node:assert to verify sum(a, b) === a + b for representative cases (positive numbers, negatives, zero). Ensure the test runs and passes via `node --test`.
